channel.title: Talks on christiandarvin
channel.description: Recent content in Talks on christiandarvin

item.title: LakbAI: From Algorithms to Advocacy – 2026
item.description: We were required to conduct a seminar for senior high school STEM-ICT students as a final requirement for our Intelligent Systems course.

item.title: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence (ICAI) – 2026
item.description: We were required to present our thesis paper as a final requirement for our Intelligent Systems Course.

item.title: PyConPH Lightning Talk – 2024
item.description: A presentation on the core branches of Machine Learning delivered at PyCon Philippines 2024.
